name: user-modeling-context-management
description: User modeling pipeline + global context assembly for LLM context injection

notes.segment: Optional Chinese tokenizer for keyword extraction. Falls back to regex if not installed.
notes.fetch: Built into Node 18+. No polyfill needed.
notes.supabase: Bring your own @supabase/supabase-js client. The pipeline accepts any object matching the SupabaseClient interface in retrieval/hybrid-search.ts.
